allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://aiglasses.qzz.io/' -MaximumRedirection 5 -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing -SkipCertificateCheck } catch {} ; "---"; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://aiglasses.qzz.io/' -Method Head -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "HTTP HEAD STATUS=$\($r2.StatusCode\) Location=$\($r2.Headers.Location\) Server=$\($r2.Headers.Server\)" } catch { "ERR HEAD: $\($_.Exception.Message\)`nSTATUS=$\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)`nLOC=$\($_.Exception.Response.Headers.Location\)" })

PowerShell($ua = 'SiteSense-AI-Scanner/1.0 \(authorized-audit\)'; $base='http://aiglasses.qzz.io'; foreach \($p in @\('/', '/robots.txt', '/sitemap.xml', '/llms.txt'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$p" -Headers @{'User-Agent'=$ua} -MaximumRedirection 5 -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; "$p`: $\($r.StatusCode\) CT=$\($r.Headers.'Content-Type'\) Len=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "$p`: ERR $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) $\($_.Exception.Message.Split\("`n"\)[0]\)" } })

PowerShell($ua = 'SiteSense-AI-Scanner/1.0 \(authorized-audit\)'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://aiglasses.qzz.io/robots.txt' -Headers @{'User-Agent'=$ua} -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; "--- robots.txt ---"; $r.Content; "--- 首頁 \(with Argus UA\) head ---"; $rh = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://aiglasses.qzz.io/' -Headers @{'User-Agent'=$ua} -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; $rh.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(1500,$rh.Content.Length\)\))
